title: Bandorium
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bandorium''' was a rare and valuable liquid metal which was useful in advanced counter-sensor packages. Many people believed that it was a key part of [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking devices]]. Bandorium was mined from the [[Deepsea Mining Platforms]] on [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]].

The star yacht ''[[Nova's Heart]]'' had an overcoat of this metal.<ref name="Shadow Games">''[[Shadow Games]]''</ref>

{{Substance-stub}}
